case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS HO, KI WON DBA HIGH TECH ROOFING AND CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT HO, KI WON DBA HIGH TECH ROOFING AND CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, KI WON DBA HIGH TECH ROOFING AND CONSTRUCTION $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
